trans-unit.source: IFRC GIS Training Platform
trans-unit.target: IFRC GIS Training Platform

trans-unit.source: GIS training for humanitarian and anticipatory action
trans-unit.target: GIS training for humanitarian and anticipatory action

trans-unit.source: Welcome to the **IFRC Network GIS Training Platform**.
trans-unit.target: Welcome to the **IFRC Network GIS Training Platform**.

trans-unit.source: This platform provides **training materials, tools, and applied examples** to support the use of **QGIS in the Red Cross Red Crescent Network**, with a strong focus on **Anticipatory Action** and humanitarian decision-making.
trans-unit.target: This platform provides **training materials, tools, and applied examples** to support the use of **QGIS in the Red Cross Red Crescent Network**, with a strong focus on **Anticipatory Action** and humanitarian decision-making.

trans-unit.source: The content is designed primarily for **GIS trainers**, but also supports practitioners and technical staff who work with geospatial data in operational contexts. :::
trans-unit.target: The content is designed primarily for **GIS trainers**, but also supports practitioners and technical staff who work with geospatial data in operational contexts. :::

trans-unit.source: How to Use This Platform
trans-unit.target: How to Use This Platform

trans-unit.source: :::{card} Start teaching :link: https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_TOT_intro.html This platform is primarily designed to support **GIS trainers** in the IFRC Network.
trans-unit.target: :::{card} Start teaching :link: https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_TOT_intro.html This platform is primarily designed to support **GIS trainers** in the IFRC Network.

trans-unit.source: You can:
trans-unit.target: You can:

trans-unit.source: Use **training plans** to structure complete courses
trans-unit.target: Use **training plans** to structure complete courses

trans-unit.source: Combine **modules, exercises, tools, and case studies**
trans-unit.target: Combine **modules, exercises, tools, and case studies**

trans-unit.source: Adapt materials to different operational and country contexts
trans-unit.target: Adapt materials to different operational and country contexts

trans-unit.source: All trainer-specific guidance is collected in the **Trainer’s Corner**, which is part of the *Learn* section. :::
trans-unit.target: All trainer-specific guidance is collected in the **Trainer’s Corner**, which is part of the *Learn* section. :::

trans-unit.source: :::{card} Start learning :link: https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_1/en_module_1_overview.html
trans-unit.target: :::{card} Start learning :link: https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Module_1/en_module_1_overview.html

trans-unit.source: This is **not a self-learning platform**.
trans-unit.target: This is **not a self-learning platform**.

trans-unit.source: Learning is most effective when guided by an experienced trainer. Modules and exercises are designed to support **instructor-led trainings**, but can also be revisited to refresh and consolidate skills.
trans-unit.target: Learning is most effective when guided by an experienced trainer. Modules and exercises are designed to support **instructor-led trainings**, but can also be revisited to refresh and consolidate skills.

trans-unit.source: Your trainer will guide you through the appropriate learning path. :::
trans-unit.target: Your trainer will guide you through the appropriate learning path. :::

trans-unit.source: What You’ll Find on the Platform
trans-unit.target: What You’ll Find on the Platform

trans-unit.source: The platform is organised around **three main pillars**, reflecting how the content is used in practice.
trans-unit.target: The platform is organised around **three main pillars**, reflecting how the content is used in practice.

trans-unit.source: 🎓 Learn
trans-unit.target: 🎓 Learn

trans-unit.source: **Build GIS knowledge and teaching capacity**
trans-unit.target: **Build GIS knowledge and teaching capacity**

trans-unit.source: Learning modules (basic to advanced)
trans-unit.target: Learning modules (basic to advanced)

trans-unit.source: Hands-on exercises
trans-unit.target: Hands-on exercises

trans-unit.source: GIS Wiki and glossary
trans-unit.target: GIS Wiki and glossary

trans-unit.source: Guidance for trainers and training plans
trans-unit.target: Guidance for trainers and training plans

trans-unit.source: This pillar contains everything needed to **teach and learn GIS with QGIS**. :::
trans-unit.target: This pillar contains everything needed to **teach and learn GIS with QGIS**. :::

trans-unit.source: 🌍 Apply
trans-unit.target: 🌍 Apply

trans-unit.source: **Use GIS in real humanitarian contexts**
trans-unit.target: **Use GIS in real humanitarian contexts**

trans-unit.source: GIS in Anticipatory Action
trans-unit.target: GIS in Anticipatory Action

trans-unit.source: Country- and hazard-specific case studies
trans-unit.target: Country- and hazard-specific case studies

trans-unit.source: Applied analyses and workflows
trans-unit.target: Applied analyses and workflows

trans-unit.source: Exercises focused on operational use cases
trans-unit.target: Exercises focused on operational use cases

trans-unit.source: This pillar shows **how GIS supports real-world decision-making**. :::
trans-unit.target: This pillar shows **how GIS supports real-world decision-making**. :::

trans-unit.source: 🛠️ Tools & Methods
trans-unit.target: 🛠️ Tools & Methods

trans-unit.source: **Reusable tools and workflows**
trans-unit.target: **Reusable tools and workflows**

trans-unit.source: QGIS plugins and tools
trans-unit.target: QGIS plugins and tools

trans-unit.source: Method-specific documentation
trans-unit.target: Method-specific documentation

trans-unit.source: Tool-focused tutorials and guidance
trans-unit.target: Tool-focused tutorials and guidance

trans-unit.source: These tools are often used in applied case studies, but are documented separately to support **reuse across contexts**. :::
trans-unit.target: These tools are often used in applied case studies, but are documented separately to support **reuse across contexts**. :::

trans-unit.source: Learning Pathways (Modules Overview)
trans-unit.target: Learning Pathways (Modules Overview)

trans-unit.source: The learning content is organised into **three progressive skill levels**, each consisting of three modules.
trans-unit.target: The learning content is organised into **three progressive skill levels**, each consisting of three modules.

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} 🟢 Basic Skills | Module 1 – Introduction to GIS | Module 2 – Working with Geodata | Module 3 – Basic GIS Operations | |---|---|---| | GIS fundamentals | Vector & raster basics | Editing & selection | | QGIS interface | Data sources | Attribute queries | | Maps & cartography | Projections | Spatial queries | | WebGIS & mobile apps | Importing data | Classification | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} 🟢 Basic Skills | Module 1 – Introduction to GIS | Module 2 – Working with Geodata | Module 3 – Basic GIS Operations | |---|---|---| | GIS fundamentals | Vector & raster basics | Editing & selection | | QGIS interface | Data sources | Attribute queries | | Maps & cartography | Projections | Spatial queries | | WebGIS & mobile apps | Importing data | Classification | :::

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} 🟡 Intermediate Skills | Module 4 – Representation | Module 5 – GIS Operations | Module 6 – Data Analysis | |---|---|---| | Symbology & styling | Geoprocessing | Raster basics | | Map layouts | Spatial joins | Plugins (e.g. QuickOSM) | | Atlases | Attribute operations | | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} 🟡 Intermediate Skills | Module 4 – Representation | Module 5 – GIS Operations | Module 6 – Data Analysis | |---|---|---| | Symbology & styling | Geoprocessing | Raster basics | | Map layouts | Spatial joins | Plugins (e.g. QuickOSM) | | Atlases | Attribute operations | | :::

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} 🔴 Advanced Skills | Module 7 – Automation | Module 8 – Remote Sensing | Module 9 – Accessibility | |---|---|---| | Model builder | Raster analysis | Accessibility analysis | | Automation concepts | Zonal statistics | Spatial analysis | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} 🔴 Advanced Skills | Module 7 – Automation | Module 8 – Remote Sensing | Module 9 – Accessibility | |---|---|---| | Model builder | Raster analysis | Accessibility analysis | | Automation concepts | Zonal statistics | Spatial analysis | :::

trans-unit.source: GIS in Anticipatory Action
trans-unit.target: GIS in Anticipatory Action

trans-unit.source: Applying GIS to anticipatory decision-making
trans-unit.target: Applying GIS to anticipatory decision-making

trans-unit.source: The **GIS in Anticipatory Action** section demonstrates how GIS is used to support early action before disasters occur.
trans-unit.target: The **GIS in Anticipatory Action** section demonstrates how GIS is used to support early action before disasters occur.

trans-unit.source: It includes:
trans-unit.target: It includes:

trans-unit.source: Country- and hazard-specific case studies (e.g. cyclones, droughts, floods)
trans-unit.target: Country- and hazard-specific case studies (e.g. cyclones, droughts, floods)

trans-unit.source: Trigger and impact analyses
trans-unit.target: Trigger and impact analyses

trans-unit.source: Applied workflows using QGIS and specialised tools
trans-unit.target: Applied workflows using QGIS and specialised tools

trans-unit.source: This section connects **learning content** with **operational practice**. :::
trans-unit.target: This section connects **learning content** with **operational practice**. :::

trans-unit.source: Recently Updated Content
trans-unit.target: Recently Updated Content

trans-unit.source: :::{card} Stay up to date with new and revised materials on the platform.
trans-unit.target: :::{card} Stay up to date with new and revised materials on the platform.

trans-unit.source: **2026-02-10** — Sketch Map Tool: updated workflow *(Tools & Methods)*
trans-unit.target: **2026-02-10** — Sketch Map Tool: updated workflow *(Tools & Methods)*

trans-unit.source: **2026-02-03** — Somalia: drought trigger analysis added *(Apply – GIS in AA)*
trans-unit.target: **2026-02-03** — Somalia: drought trigger analysis added *(Apply – GIS in AA)*

trans-unit.source: **2026-01-28** — Exercise: spatial selection refreshed *(Learn – Exercises)*
trans-unit.target: **2026-01-28** — Exercise: spatial selection refreshed *(Learn – Exercises)*

trans-unit.source: 👉 See the full **What’s New** overview for recent updates. :::
trans-unit.target: 👉 See the full **What’s New** overview for recent updates. :::

trans-unit.source: Contact & Contribution
trans-unit.target: Contact & Contribution

trans-unit.source: :::{admonition} Contact the IFRC GIS Training Platform Team Questions, feedback, or ideas? 📧 **gis-training-platform@heigit.org** :::
trans-unit.target: :::{admonition} Contact the IFRC GIS Training Platform Team Questions, feedback, or ideas? 📧 **gis-training-platform@heigit.org** :::

trans-unit.source: Contributing
trans-unit.target: Contributing

trans-unit.source: We welcome contributions from across the IFRC Network. Please read the **Contribution Plan** before contributing new materials.
trans-unit.target: We welcome contributions from across the IFRC Network. Please read the **Contribution Plan** before contributing new materials.

trans-unit.source: Join the Community
trans-unit.target: Join the Community

trans-unit.source: 🤝 Learning is strongest when shared. Join trainers, practitioners, and GIS experts across the IFRC Network to strengthen humanitarian and anticipatory action through geospatial data.
trans-unit.target: 🤝 Learning is strongest when shared. Join trainers, practitioners, and GIS experts across the IFRC Network to strengthen humanitarian and anticipatory action through geospatial data.

trans-unit.source: Happy Mapping!
trans-unit.target: Happy Mapping!
